input: I caught the bus for 6 km to class. I studied all afternoon. At night I turned on the heater for 45 minutes.
I went to work in a BMW X5 SUV for 13km. On the return trip I took a taxi 13 km.
While I charged my phone for 2 hours, I turned on the heater for 1 hour.
I went for a 3 km walk in my new shoes. I bought a shirt afterward.
I cooked dinner in the electric oven for 45 minutes. I took the train 6 km home.
I had a 10 minute hot shower this morning. I rode my bicycle 2 km later.
I used natural gas for cooking for 30 minutes. I walked 2 km to the shops.
I watched TV for 2 hours. Afterwards I used 3 kWh of electricity.
I travelled 6 km in a petrol hatchback to meet friends. Later I used 1kwh of electricity.
I took a 7k ride in a toytoa camery. Later, I used 2kwh electricity.
I caught the bus for 4km! Later I turned on the heater for 1hr?
